events.title: Spring Park Visit - Kaiyan Family
events.description: A gentle spring outing for the Kaiyan family. Planned activities include a picnic by the lake, feeding ducks, and a short nature walk suitable for all ages.

events.title: Community Health Workshop
events.description: A public workshop on elderly care and mental health awareness. Open to all families we support. Guest speaker from the local health bureau.

events.title: Weekly Companionship Visit - Shuyuan Family
events.description: Regular companionship visit to help with daily tasks and provide social interaction for the elderly members.

events.title: Youth Mentorship Program Kickoff
events.description: Launch event for our new mentorship program. Student volunteers meet the children they'll be mentoring throughout the semester.

events.title: Weekend Field Trip - Rural Village Visit
events.description: An educational field trip to a traditional village. Families will learn about local culture, visit a community garden, and enjoy a home-cooked meal with local families.

events.title: Monthly Team Meeting
events.description: Regular monthly meeting to review ongoing support plans, discuss family updates, and plan upcoming activities.
